---
title: "project"
image: images/IMG_9675.JPG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
---

My name is Nga Nguyen, but you can call me Daisy. I am from Da Nang, Vietnam. I started studying abroad in high school in a small town called Bettendorf, Iowa. I then attended college at Lawrence University in Appleton, Wisconsin.
